title: citrus × aurata var. histrix
intro: Citrus × aurata var. histrix, also known as the Meyer lemon, is a citrus plant that is a hybrid of a lemon and an orange. It has been used for its medicinal properties, including its high vitamin C content and its ability to aid in digestion and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of the Meyer lemon include its potential to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and improve respiratory function, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as essential oils, teas, and extracts, which can be used to treat a range of health issues.
